Respondent Trustees Petition For Instructions Requesting An Order Of The Court Authorizing And Instructing Trustees To Enforce A Judgment And Incur Associated Expenses As An Expense Of The Trust
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2023 Vacated
OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2023 Continued To Mar-27-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial
Off Calendar Mar-06-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust; To Determine Property That Belongs To The Estate; And To Determine The Validity Of A Contract To Make A Devise
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Continued To Mar-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via Zoom, for Jesus V. Espinoza Jr., Petitioner; Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, for Betsy, Heidy, Cinddy, and Giselle Espinoza, Respondents; Mitchell Miller, via CourtCall, for and with Guerrero Espinoza, Objector.

The court acknowledges and thanks counsel for the recently filed Joint Case Management Statement and advises that it is intrigued with the posture of Respondent's Amended Heggstad Petition and Mr. Gruwell's subsequent filing of Notice of non-Opposition thereon. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the Amended Heggstad Petition and whether it should be adjudicated along with the Petition to Determine Validity of Trust, etc., at trial. Mr. Miller believes that the Amended Heggstad petition should be resolved prior to the other petition. Ms. Ebey and Mr. Gruwell offer their positions regarding whether the two petitions should be concurrently adjudicated. The court advises that it is not inclined to rule on the Heggstad petition at this time and there is an agreement to continue the petition to a date after adjudication of the related petition.

After additional discussion, the Status of Mediation and Case Management Hearing are taken off calendar. Respondent Trustee's Petition for Instructions, etc., is continued to May-01-2023 in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

***After hearing (12/21/2022): After consideration by the court, the Petition to Determine Validity, etc., is set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on Mar-06-2023 at 9:30 a.m. A copy of the order and notice of trial will be provided to Counsel.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Off Calendar

Respondent Trustees Petition For Instructions Requesting An Order Of The Court Authorizing And Instructing Trustees To Enforce A Judgment And Incur Associated Expenses As An Expense Of The Trust
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Continued To May-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Off Calendar

Respondent Trustees Petition For Instructions Requesting An Order Of The Court Authorizing And Instructing Trustees To Enforce A Judgment And Incur Associated Expenses As An Expense Of The Trust
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust; To Determine Property That Belongs To The Estate; And To Determine The Validity Of A Contract To Make A Devise
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via Zoom, for Jesus Espinoza Jr., Petitioner; Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, for Betsy, Heidy, Cinddy, and Giselle Espinoza, Respondents.

The court and counsel discuss the status of this matter and counsel confirms that the matter should be ready for trial in March of 2023. Ms. Ebey advises of her intent to file an amended petition for instructions. The court and counsel discuss the possibility of additional settlement discussions. Mr. Gruwell advises that he would be open to a Settlement Conference. The court advises that it intends to schedule a Case Management hearing for the next calling of this matter and will issue an order thereon accordingly.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Dec-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Case Management Hearing is set for the same date. Respondent's Petition for Instructions, etc., is continued from Dec-14-2022 to Dec-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust; To Determine Property That Belongs To The Estate; And To Determine The Validity Of A Contract To Make A Devise
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Continued To Oct-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via Zoom, for Jesus Espinoza, Petitioner; Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, Betsy Espinoza, Heidi Espinoza, Cinddy Espinoza, and Giselle Espinoza, Respondents.

Mr. Gruwell reports of a recent mediation which did not result in a resolution, but progress has been made and is hopeful to make additional progress. Mr. Gruwell asks that the court schedule an evidentiary hearing towards the end of this year. Ms. Ebey advises that she intends to file a petition for instructions and requests a continuance accordingly. The court confirms with Mr. Gruwell that he does not, nor has he ever, represented Christina Espinoza and believes that she no longer intends to appear in this matter. The court advises that it intends to set this matter for trial and an additional status hearing. The court queries counsel regarding whether a probate estate will be filed for the trustor. Ms. Ebey advises that there are currently no assets, the reason she intends to file a petition for instructions, and accordingly it would be premature to open an estate at this time.

After additional discussion the matters are continued to Oct-12-2022. The matter is set for trial on Mar-06-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust; To Determine Property That Belongs To The Estate; And To Determine The Validity Of A Contract To Make A Devise
Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Continued To May-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, for Jesus V. Espinoza, Jr., Petitioner; Amanda Ebey, via ZOOM, for Betsy, Heidy, Cinndy, and Giselle Espinosa, Respondents.

The court queries counsel regarding their respective positions regarding ADR. Mr. Gruwell reports that he would be interested in participating in pro bono mediation and advises that additional discovery would assist with settlement discussions. Ms. Ebey reports that she is open to mediation but that the pending discovery may be a roadblock to resolving this matter. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than May-06-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by May-13-2022. The matter is continued to May-25-2022 and the Parties are to return on May-25-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust; To Determine Property That Belongs To The Estate; And To Determine The Validity Of A Contract To Make A Devise
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Continued To Nov-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, via ZOOM, for Betsy, Heidy, Cinddy and Giselle Espinosa, Respondents; Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, for Jesus Espinosa, Jr., Petitioner.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of daughter Christina Espinosa in this matter. Mr. Gruwell reports that his understanding is that Christina no longer plans on being a party to this action. The court then queries counsel as to the status of discovery and settlement discussions. Mr. Gruwell reports first that the venue issue seems to have been resolved. Mr. Gruwell then reports that discovery remains as well as depositions. He also reports that his client is prepared to participate in meditation. Ms. Ebey reports she believes that her clients are currently not ready to participate in settlement discussions. Counsel is then advised that the court is likely to refer the matter to mediation.

The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust, etc., is continued to 11/29/2021. The parties are ordered to file a joint status statement by 11/15/2021.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust; To Determine Property That Belongs To The Estate; And To Determine The Validity Of A Contract To Make A Devise
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, for Jesus Espinoza, Petitioner; Amanda Ebey, via ZOOM, for Betsey Espinoza, Heidy Espinoza, Cinddy Espinoza and Giselle Espinoza, Objectors; Tina Espinoza, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Interested Party.

The court at the outset requests confirmation regarding who lives at the real property located at 355 Naples Street, San Francisco. Ms. Ebey reports that her clients have lived there at some point, continue to receive mail there and is the principal residence of Administration. The court then asks for confirmation of the value of the estate. Ms. Ebey reports that the value of the estate is tied to the sale of a family business. Consequently, the value of the estate is unknown. Tina Espinoza then requests a continuance of this matter so that she can hire counsel.

The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust, etc., is continued to August 2, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
